title: Torches Reimagined
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b11b692ead9e7be9e3d7c6a8e9b62da2e2079af0.png)


## TO GET CUSTOM TORCH FIRE SOUNDS, YOU NEED TO DOWNLOAD THE [POLYTONE](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) MOD!


This pack is originally from my pack [Minecraft Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) but I thought some people may like it but not my pack, so I decided to give it, it's standalone pack!


![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

Torches Reimagined aims to freshen up the old vanilla torch and hopefully make 'em feel a lot more immersive.
When placed onto a wall they'll be held up by an actual holder that's stuck to the wall. They now also have a fully custom animated fire applied to their new 3D model and a custom 3D model when held in your hand. Of course, the repeater as well as the comparators have been altered to match the new redstone torch as well!

On top of all this though, when placed the torch will emit a faint fire sound!

![Preview](https://i.gyazo.com/8a039267e8408d2d73b6a3007789bbf0.gif)


![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)
